title: Switzerland Stayed Empty

mood.label: Uneasy calm
mood.summary: A day balanced on a wire: the talks meant to seal the peace were called off and a hilltop in Lebanon ran red, yet a late-brokered truce and a run of bright science news kept the floor from giving way, leaving the mood in the uneasy middle.

style.genre: motorik / dub-techno — a sampled kalimba and vibraphone tracing a circular topline over a steady, driving TR-909 pulse with tape-echo, a deep sine sub and a bowed-string drone underneath; Ab dorian's raised sixth keeping the minor key from settling into gloom, neither rising nor giving in

pattern: stack( s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ ~ hh ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.62).room(0.18), s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.2).pan(sine.range(0.35,0.65).slow(7)).hpf(6000), note("<af2 af2 ef2 gf2>").s("sine").lpf(420).gain(0.5).attack(0.01).release(0.4), note("[af3,cf4,ef4] ~ [gf3,bf3,ef4] ~ [ef3,gf3,bf3] ~ [df3,f3,af3] ~").s("sawtooth").attack(0.6).sustain(0.7).release(2.4).lpf(sine.range(520,1500).slow(14)).gain(0.22).room(0.45).rsize(3), note("af4 ~ cf5 ef5 ~ bf4 f4 ~ gf4 ~ af4 ~ ef4 ~ ~ ~").s("kalimba").gain(0.5).lpf(3200).delay(0.32).delaytime(0.291).delayfeedback(0.34).pan(0.4).room(0.3).off(0.125, x => x.gain(0.18).pan(0.62)), note("~ ~ ef5 ~ ~ ~ af5 ~ ~ ~ ~ gf5 ~ ~ ~ ~").s("vibraphone").gain(0.33).room(0.5).rsize(4).delay(0.25).delaytime(0.375), note("<af3 ef3 gf3 df3>").s("sawtooth").attack(1.4).release(3).lpf(900).gain(0.14).room(0.6) )
sampleSources: Strudel default library (sampled piano, VCSL, Roland drum machines)

lines: Booked a room in Switzerland, nobody came to the door,
the deal we already signed asked us to sign a little more.
On a hilltop near Nabatiyeh the morning turned to lead —
four soldiers and twenty-one, and a promise made for the dead.
So we hold the middle, the floor still under our feet,
a truce came in by midnight nobody would repeat.
Hold the middle, the strait still open and wide —
ten million barrels moving on the uneasy tide.
A refinery's burning in Moscow, drones across the dark,
but a mouse regrew a joint and somebody lit a spark —
a vaccine cut the odds in half, cold metal held the cold,
good news kept its quiet seat at the table while the bad got told.
So we hold the middle, the floor still under our feet,
a truce came in by midnight nobody would repeat.
Hold the middle, the strait still open and wide —
ten million barrels moving on the uneasy tide.
